title: DE PRINCIPES VAN EEN GOED REINIGINGS- EN DESINFECTIEPROGRAMMA VOOR PLUIMVEEBEDRIJVEN
description: A guide for proper cleaning and disinfection practices in poultry farms aimed at reducing pathogen load and minimizing infection risk through a structured protocol. It outlines key steps such as dry and wet cleaning, rinsing, drying, disinfection, and maintenance to ensure biosecurity and animal health.
